## Type of Violation

- [ ] Trademark infringement (using the ForgeKit name or logo without permission)
- [ ] Copyright violation (removing copyright headers or NOTICE file)
- [ ] Impersonation (claiming a fork is the official ForgeKit project)
- [ ] Fraudulent npm package
- [ ] Other

## Have you already reported this to GitHub or npm?

- [ ] Yes — reported to GitHub at https://support.github.com/contact/trademark-policy
- [ ] Yes — submitted DMCA at https://github.com/contact/dmca
- [ ] Yes — reported to npm at https://www.npmjs.com/support
